description_long: This is a doll styled as a sinister nun, featuring a long white habit with a hood that covers the head and shoulders. The face is pale with exaggerated, dark eye makeup and a menacing expression, while the mouth is twisted into a grimace. The front of the robe displays a red inverted cross, adding to the eerie appearance. The hands are elongated and unnaturally thin, with dark, shadowy markings extending up the forearms. The garment is floor-length and plain, with no visible shoes or additional adornments. The overall design evokes a horror or supernatural theme, making it a striking and unsettling figure.
description: A horror-themed nun doll with a white habit, pale face, red inverted cross, and elongated, shadowy hands.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's pale, menacing face, red inverted cross on the chest, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the hooded habit, elongated hand with dark markings, and the straight fall of the robe.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain back of the habit, with the hood draping smoothly and no visible facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same elongated hand and the side profile of the face and habit.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional nun's habit in white, including a long robe, hood, and veil, with a red inverted cross on the chest and no visible patterns or brand influences.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms extended outward at shoulder height, hands open and fingers splayed, head facing forward, legs straight and close together.
attribute_facial_expression: Menacing grimace with mouth twisted, eyes wide open with dark makeup, and furrowed brows conveying an angry or sinister emotion.
attribute_hair_style: Hair completely covered by the white nun's hood and veil; no visible hair.
